vulnerabilityName: XZ Utils Backdoor
shortDescription: Malicious code introduced into XZ Utils 5.6.0 and 5.6.1 by a malicious maintainer allows SSH authentication bypass and remote code execution via liblzma.
requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or downgrade to a safe version. Affected Linux distributions have issued security advisories.

vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Outlook Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
shortDescription: Microsoft Outlook contains a remote code execution vulnerability where Moniker Link handling allows NTLM credential theft and bypass of Office Protected View.

vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Outlook Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
shortDescription: Microsoft Outlook Spoofing vulnerability allows an attacker to bypass Office Protected View and leak NTLM hashes via crafted Outlook items.

vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Outlook Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
shortDescription: Microsoft Outlook contains an elevation of privilege vulnerability that allows NTLM credential theft when a specially crafted PidLidReminderFileParameter is processed.

vulnerabilityName: Ivanti Connect Secure Authentication Bypass
shortDescription: Ivanti Connect Secure contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the web component that allows an attacker to access restricted resources.

vulnerabilityName: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Authentication Bypass
shortDescription: ConnectWise ScreenConnect 23.9.7 and prior contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows setup wizard re-enablement and admin account creation.

vulnerabilityName: JetBrains TeamCity Authentication Bypass
shortDescription: JetBrains TeamCity contains an authentication bypass vulnerability allowing unauthenticated access to administrative functionalities and full control of the server.

vulnerabilityName: Apple WebKit Type Confusion Vulnerability
shortDescription: WebKit contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows arbitrary code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content.

vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Safari and visionOS Use-After-Free Vulnerability
shortDescription: Apple operating systems contain a use-after-free vulnerability that allows arbitrary code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content.

vulnerabilityName: Jenkins Arbitrary File Read Vulnerability
shortDescription: Jenkins CLI contains an arbitrary file read vulnerability due to improper handling of @-file arguments that allows reading entire files from the controller filesystem.

vulnerabilityName: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure Command Injection Vulnerability
shortDescription: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure contain a command injection vulnerability in the web components that allows authenticated administrator to execute arbitrary commands.

product: Connect Secure, Policy Secure and ZTA Gateways
vulnerabilityName: Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways XXE Vulnerability
shortDescription: An XXE vulnerability in Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure and ZTA gateways allows an unauthenticated attacker to read certain sensitive resources.

vulnerabilityName: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect Command Injection Vulnerability
shortDescription: A command injection vulnerability in the GlobalProtect feature of Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges on the firewall.
requiredAction: Apply updates per vendor instructions or enable Threat Prevention signatures.

vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
shortDescription: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in FortiOS SSL VPN allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted HTTP requests.

vulnerabilityName: Fortra GoAnywhere MFT Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
shortDescription: GoAnywhere MFT contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the Administration portal that allows unauthorized administrative access.

vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiClientEMS SQL Injection Vulnerability
shortDescription: FortiClientEMS contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the FGFM service.

vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts 2 Path Traversal Vulnerability
shortDescription: Apache Struts 2 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to upload a malicious file and achieve remote code execution.

vulnerabilityName: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server Improper Authorization Vulnerability
shortDescription: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server contain an improper authorization vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to reset Confluence and create administrator accounts.

vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
shortDescription: A vulnerability in the web UI feature of Cisco IOS XE software allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to create a local user account with privilege level 15.

vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Command Injection Vulnerability
shortDescription: A command injection vulnerability in the web UI feature of Cisco IOS XE software allows an authenticated remote attacker with privilege level 15 to execute arbitrary commands.

vulnerabilityName: Cisco AnyConnect VPN Server Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
shortDescription: Multiple vulnerabilities in the SSL VPN feature of Cisco Small Business RV340, RV345, RV340W, and RV345W routers allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilityName: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack
shortDescription: HTTP/2 protocol contains a denial-of-service vulnerability in the handling of RST_STREAM frames that allows attackers to launch high-volume distributed denial-of-service attacks.

vulnerabilityName: Barracuda ESG Remote Command Injection Vulnerability
shortDescription: Barracuda ESG contains a remote command injection vulnerability in the processing of TAR archive files that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute commands on the ESG appliance.
requiredAction: Apply updates per vendor instructions and replace impacted appliances per vendor instructions.

vulnerabilityName: OpenSSH Server regreSSHion Remote Code Execution
shortDescription: OpenSSH server (sshd) contains a signal handler race condition that allows unauthenticated remote code execution as root on glibc-based Linux systems.

vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) Denial of Service Vulnerability
shortDescription: Windows LDAP contains a denial-of-service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to crash the LDAP service via crafted requests.

vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Winlogon Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
shortDescription: Windows Winlogon contains an elevation of privilege vulnerability that allows an attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges on the affected host.

vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Storage Spoofing Vulnerability
shortDescription: Windows Storage contains a spoofing vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to perform man-in-the-middle attacks and potentially gain elevated privileges.

vulnerabilityName: Howyar Reloader Secure Boot Bypass
shortDescription: Howyar Reloader contains a vulnerability that allows an attacker with physical access to bypass Secure Boot and execute unsigned code on affected devices.

vulnerabilityName: Ivanti Connect Secure Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
shortDescription: A server-side request forgery vulnerability in Ivanti Connect Secure allows an unauthenticated attacker to access restricted resources without authentication.

vulnerabilityName: TunnelVision VPN Traffic Interception Vulnerability
shortDescription: Various VPN clients are vulnerable to a local network attack that uses DHCP option 121 to manipulate routing tables and divert VPN traffic outside the VPN tunnel.
requiredAction: Apply updates per vendor instructions or implement mitigations per vendor advisory.

vulnerabilityName: Versa Networks Versa Director Path Traversal Vulnerability
shortDescription: Versa Director contains a path traversal vulnerability in the portal function that allows an authenticated attacker to upload arbitrary files to the server.

vulnerabilityName: Ivanti vTM Authentication Bypass
shortDescription: Ivanti vTM contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to bypass admin authentication and create new admin sessions.
